"""Pytest shared setup for backend tests."""

from __future__ import annotations

import shutil
import uuid
from pathlib import Path

import pytest


TEST_TMP_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / '.pytest-temp-tests'


@pytest.fixture()
def tmp_path() -> Path:
    """Provide a writable per-test temp dir independent of system TMP ACL quirks."""
    TEST_TMP_ROOT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    test_tmp_dir = TEST_TMP_ROOT / uuid.uuid4().hex
    test_tmp_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=False)
    try:
        yield test_tmp_dir
    finally:
        shutil.rmtree(test_tmp_dir, ignore_errors=True)

from dataclasses import replace
import io
import zipfile

import pytest
import yaml
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

from rtb.app.main import app
from rtb.app.core.constants import API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT, API_PROJECT_IMPORTS_ENDPOINT
from rtb.app.core.settings import SETTINGS
from rtb.app.db import bootstrap as db_bootstrap
from rtb.app.services import command_dispatcher, project_catalog, project_storage


@pytest.fixture()
def runtime_env(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
    data_root = tmp_path / 'runtime_data'
    test_settings = replace(
        SETTINGS,
        data_root=data_root,
        sqlite_path=data_root / 'platform.db',
        workspace_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'projects',
        workspace_deleted_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'deleted_projects',
        workspace_project_exports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'exports',
        workspace_project_imports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'imports',
    )

    monkeypatch.setattr(db_bootstrap, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_catalog, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts.clear()

    db_bootstrap.bootstrap_storage()
    return test_settings


def _make_archive(entries: dict[str, str | bytes]) -> bytes:
    payload = io.BytesIO()
    with zipfile.ZipFile(payload, mode='w', compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as archive:
        for path, value in entries.items():
            if path.endswith('/'):
                archive.writestr(path, b'')
                continue
            data = value if isinstance(value, bytes) else value.encode('utf-8')
            archive.writestr(path, data)
    return payload.getvalue()


def _base_project_yaml(name: str) -> str:
    return yaml.safe_dump(
        {
            'kind': 'metaplatform.project',
            'version': 1,
            'project': {
                'id': 'legacy-imported-id',
                'name': name,
                'description': 'imported project',
            },
            'modules': ['MetaGen', 'MetaLab', 'MetaView'],
            'paths': {
                'metagen': 'metagen',
                'metalab': 'metalab',
                'metaview': 'metaview',
                'generated': 'generated',
            },
        },
        sort_keys=False,
        allow_unicode=True,
    )


def _post_import(client: TestClient, archive_name: str, archive_bytes: bytes):
    return client.post(
        API_PROJECT_IMPORTS_ENDPOINT,
        files={'archive': (archive_name, archive_bytes, 'application/zip')},
    )


def test_import_project_success_registers_project_lists_and_opens(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Imported Alpha'),
            'metagen/pump.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component', 'component': {'id': 'pump'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'metalab/start.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario', 'scenario': {'id': 'start'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'metaview/main.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen', 'screen': {'id': 'main'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'generated/artifact.txt': 'keep-generated',
        }
    )

    import_response = _post_import(client, 'imported-alpha.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert import_response['ok'] is True
    imported_project = import_response['result']['project']
    assert imported_project['name'] == 'Imported Alpha'
    assert imported_project['slug'] == 'imported-alpha'

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={'requestId': 'req-import-list', 'module': 'platform', 'command': 'listProjects', 'payload': {}},
    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    listed_ids = [item['id'] for item in list_response['result']['projects']]
    assert imported_project['id'] in listed_ids

    open_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-import-open',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': imported_project['id']},
        },
    ).json()
    assert open_response['ok'] is True
    snapshot = open_response['result']['snapshot']
    assert snapshot['project']['projectId'] == imported_project['id']
    assert snapshot['project']['name'] == imported_project['name']
    assert snapshot['documents']['metagen'][0]['path'].startswith(f"backend://{imported_project['id']}/metagen/")

    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / imported_project['slug']
    assert (project_root / 'generated' / 'artifact.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'keep-generated'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_supports_single_wrapper_folder_layout(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'wrapped/': b'',
            'wrapped/project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Wrapped Import'),
            'wrapped/metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapped/metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapped/metaview/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen'}, sort_keys=False),
        }
    )

    response = _post_import(client, 'wrapped.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is True
    assert response['result']['project']['name'] == 'Wrapped Import'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_invalid_zip_payload(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    response = _post_import(client, 'bad.zip', b'not-a-zip-payload').json()
    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_IMPORT_INVALID_ARCHIVE'
    assert response['error']['details']['reason'] == 'invalid_zip'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_archive_without_project_yaml(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
            'metaview/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen'}, sort_keys=False),
        }
    )

    response = _post_import(client, 'missing-project-yaml.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_IMPORT_INVALID_ARCHIVE'
    assert response['error']['details']['reason'] == 'missing_project_yaml'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_invalid_project_structure(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Invalid Structure'),
            'metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
        }
    )

    response = _post_import(client, 'invalid-structure.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_IMPORT_INVALID_ARCHIVE'
    assert response['error']['details']['reason'] == 'invalid_structure'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_multi_root_ambiguous_layout(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'wrapper/project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Ambiguous'),
            'wrapper/metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapper/metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapper/metaview/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen'}, sort_keys=False),
            'extra.txt': 'garbage',
        }
    )

    response = _post_import(client, 'ambiguous.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_IMPORT_INVALID_ARCHIVE'
    assert response['error']['details']['reason'] == 'invalid_layout'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_non_zip_extension_with_import_invalid_archive_code(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive({'project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Wrong Extension')})

    response = _post_import(client, 'wrong-extension.txt', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_IMPORT_INVALID_ARCHIVE'
    assert response['error']['details']['reason'] == 'invalid_zip'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_rejects_non_multipart_payload_as_validation_error(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    response = client.post(
        API_PROJECT_IMPORTS_ENDPOINT,
        headers={'content-type': 'application/json'},
        content=b'{}',
    ).json()

    assert response['ok'] is False
    assert response['error']['code'] == 'VALIDATION_ERROR'
    assert response['error']['details']['field'] == 'archive'


def test_import_slug_conflict_reuses_catalog_suffix_policy(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Conflict Name'),
            'metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
            'metaview/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen'}, sort_keys=False),
        }
    )

    first = _post_import(client, 'conflict.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    second = _post_import(client, 'conflict.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert first['ok'] is True
    assert second['ok'] is True
    assert first['result']['project']['slug'] == 'conflict-name'
    assert second['result']['project']['slug'] == 'conflict-name-2'

import json
import socket
import subprocess
import sys
import time
from pathlib import Path
from urllib import error, request

import pytest

from rtb.app.core.constants import API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT

REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
UI_PACKAGE_JSON_PATH = REPO_ROOT / 'ui' / 'package.json'
CANONICAL_BACKEND_PYTEST_COMMAND = 'set PYTHONPATH=..&& python -m pytest ..\\rtb\\tests -q -p no:cacheprovider'
CANONICAL_STARTUP_TARGET = 'rtb.app.main:app'
CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS = [
    sys.executable,
    '-m',
    'uvicorn',
    CANONICAL_STARTUP_TARGET,
    '--host',
    '127.0.0.1',
    '--port',
    '8000',
    '--log-level',
    'warning',
]
STARTUP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 12


def _load_ui_scripts() -> dict[str, str]:
    package_json = json.loads(UI_PACKAGE_JSON_PATH.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    scripts = package_json.get('scripts', {})
    return {str(key): str(value) for key, value in scripts.items()}


def _is_tcp_port_in_use(host: str, port: int) -> bool:
    with socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM) as probe:
        probe.settimeout(0.2)
        return probe.connect_ex((host, port)) == 0


def _wait_for_http_ready(url: str, timeout_seconds: int) -> bool:
    deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
    while time.time() < deadline:
        try:
            with request.urlopen(url, timeout=0.5) as response:
                if response.status == 200:
                    return True
        except (error.URLError, TimeoutError):
            time.sleep(0.15)
    return False


def test_verification_policy_constants_are_explicit():
    scripts = _load_ui_scripts()

    assert scripts['test'] == 'node --test --test-isolation=none ../tests/*.test.js'
    assert scripts['test:integration'] == 'npm.cmd test'
    assert scripts['test:all'] == 'npm.cmd test && npm.cmd run test:backend'
    assert scripts['test:backend'] == CANONICAL_BACKEND_PYTEST_COMMAND
    assert CANONICAL_STARTUP_TARGET == 'rtb.app.main:app'
    assert CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS[0] == sys.executable
    assert CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS[1:4] == ['-m', 'uvicorn', CANONICAL_STARTUP_TARGET]
    assert '--host' in CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS
    assert '--port' in CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS


def test_bounded_uvicorn_startup_probe_starts_and_stops_cleanly():
    if _is_tcp_port_in_use('127.0.0.1', 8000):
        pytest.skip('Port 8000 is already in use; bounded startup probe requires the canonical port.')

    process = subprocess.Popen(
        CANONICAL_STARTUP_ARGS,
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
        text=True,
    )
    try:
        openapi_ready = _wait_for_http_ready('http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json', STARTUP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS)
        assert openapi_ready, 'Uvicorn did not become ready within timeout.'

        payload = json.dumps(
            {
                'requestId': 'probe-list-projects',
                'module': 'platform',
                'command': 'listProjects',
                'payload': {},
            }
        ).encode('utf-8')
        http_request = request.Request(
            f'http://127.0.0.1:8000{API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT}',
            data=payload,
            headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
            method='POST',
        )
        with request.urlopen(http_request, timeout=1.5) as response:
            body = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8'))
        assert response.status == 200
        assert body['ok'] is True
    finally:
        process.terminate()
        try:
            process.wait(timeout=5)
        except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
            process.kill()
            process.wait(timeout=5)

from dataclasses import replace
import io
import zipfile

import pytest
import yaml
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

from rtb.app.main import app
from rtb.app.core.constants import API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT
from rtb.app.core.settings import SETTINGS
from rtb.app.db import bootstrap as db_bootstrap
from rtb.app.services import project_catalog
from rtb.app.services import project_storage
from rtb.app.services import command_dispatcher
from rtb.app.services.errors import ProjectCreateIssue


@pytest.fixture()
def runtime_env(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
    data_root = tmp_path / 'runtime_data'
    test_settings = replace(
        SETTINGS,
        data_root=data_root,
        sqlite_path=data_root / 'platform.db',
        workspace_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'projects',
        workspace_deleted_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'deleted_projects',
        workspace_project_exports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'exports',
        workspace_project_imports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'imports',
    )

    monkeypatch.setattr(db_bootstrap, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_catalog, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts.clear()

    db_bootstrap.bootstrap_storage()
    return test_settings


def _headers_for_user(runtime_env, user_id: str | None = None) -> dict[str, str]:
    normalized_user_id = str(user_id or runtime_env.default_user_id).strip() or runtime_env.default_user_id
    return {
        runtime_env.request_user_id_header: normalized_user_id,
    }


def _open_project_and_get_lock(client: TestClient, project_id: str, *, runtime_env, user_id: str | None = None) -> str:
    response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': f'req-open-lock-{project_id}-{user_id or runtime_env.default_user_id}',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project_id},
        },
        headers=_headers_for_user(runtime_env, user_id),
    ).json()
    assert response['ok'] is True
    lock_token = str(response['result'].get('lockToken', '')).strip()
    assert lock_token
    return lock_token

def test_open_project_success_returns_snapshot_with_raw_and_documents(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-openable',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Backend Open'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']

    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / project['slug']
    metagen_file = project_root / 'metagen' / 'pump.yaml'
    metalab_file = project_root / 'metalab' / 'startup.yaml'
    metaview_file = project_root / 'metaview' / 'main.yaml'

    metagen_file.write_text(
        yaml.safe_dump(
            {
                'kind': 'metagen.component',
                'component': {'id': 'pump', 'name': 'Pump'},
            },
            sort_keys=False,
            allow_unicode=True,
        ),
        encoding='utf-8',
    )
    metalab_file.write_text(
        yaml.safe_dump(
            {
                'kind': 'metalab.scenario',
                'scenario': {'id': 'startup', 'name': 'Startup'},
            },
            sort_keys=False,
            allow_unicode=True,
        ),
        encoding='utf-8',
    )
    metaview_file.write_text(
        yaml.safe_dump(
            {
                'kind': 'metaview.screen',
                'screen': {'id': 'main', 'name': 'Main'},
            },
            sort_keys=False,
            allow_unicode=True,
        ),
        encoding='utf-8',
    )

    opened = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-open-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
    ).json()

    assert opened['ok'] is True
    assert isinstance(opened['result']['lockToken'], str)
    assert opened['result']['lockToken']
    snapshot = opened['result']['snapshot']
    assert snapshot['source'] == 'backend'
    assert snapshot['project']['projectId'] == project['id']
    assert snapshot['project']['name'] == project['name']
    assert snapshot['project']['slug'] == project['slug']
    assert snapshot['raw']['kind'] == 'metaplatform.project'
    assert snapshot['raw']['project']['id'] == project['id']
    assert len(snapshot['documents']['metagen']) == 1
    assert len(snapshot['documents']['metalab']) == 1
    assert len(snapshot['documents']['metaview']) == 1
    assert snapshot['documents']['metagen'][0]['path'].startswith(f"backend://{project['id']}/metagen/")
    assert snapshot['documents']['metagen'][0]['document']['component']['name'] == 'Pump'


def test_open_project_repeated_by_same_user_reuses_lock_and_keeps_single_active_session(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-open-reuse',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Lock Reuse'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    headers = _headers_for_user(runtime_env, 'user-a')

    first_open = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-open-reuse-1',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
        headers=headers,
    ).json()
    second_open = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-open-reuse-2',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
        headers=headers,
    ).json()

    assert first_open['ok'] is True
    assert second_open['ok'] is True
    assert first_open['result']['lockToken'] == second_open['result']['lockToken']

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        lock_row = db.execute(
            'SELECT user_id, lock_token, expires_at FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
        active_sessions = db.execute(
            'SELECT session_id, user_id, lock_token, is_active FROM project_sessions WHERE project_id = ? AND is_active = 1',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchall()

    assert lock_row is not None
    assert lock_row['user_id'] == 'user-a'
    assert lock_row['lock_token'] == first_open['result']['lockToken']
    assert len(active_sessions) == 1
    assert active_sessions[0]['user_id'] == 'user-a'
    assert active_sessions[0]['lock_token'] == first_open['result']['lockToken']
    assert active_sessions[0]['is_active'] == 1

def test_list_projects_hides_stale_lock_and_deactivates_stale_session(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-list-lock-stale',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'List Lock Stale'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    lock_token = _open_project_and_get_lock(client, project['id'], runtime_env=runtime_env, user_id='stale-user')
    assert lock_token

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        db.execute(
            'UPDATE project_locks SET expires_at = ? WHERE project_id = ?',
            ('2000-01-01T00:00:00Z', project['id']),
        )
        db.commit()

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-list-lock-stale',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'listProjects',
            'payload': {},
        },
    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    listed_project = next(item for item in list_response['result']['projects'] if item['id'] == project['id'])
    assert listed_project['lockedBy'] is None

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        lock_row = db.execute(
            'SELECT 1 FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
        stale_session = db.execute(
            '''
            SELECT is_active, closed_at
            FROM project_sessions
            WHERE project_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND lock_token = ?
            ORDER BY updated_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
            ''',
            (project['id'], 'stale-user', lock_token),
        ).fetchone()
    assert lock_row is None
    assert stale_session is not None
    assert stale_session['is_active'] == 0
    assert stale_session['closed_at']

def test_open_project_missing_root_path_returns_project_open_failed(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-missing-root',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Missing Root'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / project['slug']

    for item in project_root.rglob('*'):
        if item.is_file():
            item.unlink()
    for directory in sorted([entry for entry in project_root.rglob('*') if entry.is_dir()], reverse=True):
        directory.rmdir()
    project_root.rmdir()

    response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,

def test_delete_project_success_moves_storage_and_marks_deleted(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-delete-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Delete Success'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / project['slug']
    project_file_before = (project_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')

    response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-delete-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'deleteProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
    )
    body = response.json()
    assert body['ok'] is True
    assert body['result']['projectId'] == project['id']
    assert body['result']['deleted'] is True
    assert body['result']['alreadyDeleted'] is False

    assert not project_root.exists()
    deleted_root = runtime_env.workspace_deleted_projects_root / f"{project['slug']}__{project['id']}"
    assert deleted_root.exists()
    assert (deleted_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == project_file_before

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        row = db.execute(
            'SELECT deleted_at, deleted_root_path FROM projects WHERE id = ?',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
    assert row is not None
    assert row['deleted_at'] is not None
    assert row['deleted_root_path'] == deleted_root.as_posix()

    assert save_response['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_NOT_FOUND'
    assert save_response['error']['details']['projectId'] == project['id']

                    'raw': {
                        'kind': 'metaplatform.project',
                        'version': 1,
                        'project': {
                            'id': project['id'],
                            'name': 'Save All Updated',
                            'description': 'updated',
                        },
                        'modules': ['MetaGen', 'MetaLab', 'MetaView'],
                        'paths': {
                            'metagen': 'metagen',
                            'metalab': 'metalab',
                            'metaview': 'metaview',
                            'generated': 'generated',
                        },
                    },
                    'documents': {
                        'metagen': [
                            {
                                'moduleId': 'metagen',
                                'path': f"backend://{project['id']}/metagen/pump.yaml",
                                'document': {
                                    'kind': 'metagen.component',
                                    'component': {'id': 'pump', 'name': 'Pump'},
                                },
                            }
                        ],
                        'metalab': [
                            {
                                'moduleId': 'metalab',
                                'path': f"backend://{project['id']}/metalab/startup.yaml",

                                    'kind': 'metalab.scenario',
                                    'scenario': {'id': 'startup', 'name': 'Startup'},

def test_save_all_failure_after_partial_promote_rolls_back_canonical_state(runtime_env, monkeypatch):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-save-rollback',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Rollback Guard'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / project['slug']
    lock_token = _open_project_and_get_lock(client, project['id'], runtime_env=runtime_env)

    metagen_file = project_root / 'metagen' / 'legacy.yaml'
    metagen_file.write_text(
        yaml.safe_dump(
            {
                'kind': 'metagen.component',
                'component': {'id': 'legacy', 'name': 'Legacy', 'description': 'before-failure'},
            },
            sort_keys=False,
            allow_unicode=True,
        ),
        encoding='utf-8',
    )

    def raise_promote_failure(*_args, **_kwargs):
        raise OSError('Injected project file promote failure')

    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage.ProjectStorageService, '_promote_project_file', raise_promote_failure)

    response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-rollback',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveAll',
            'payload': {
                'projectId': project['id'],
                'lockToken': lock_token,
                'projectSnapshot': {
                    'raw': {'project': {'id': project['id'], 'name': 'Should Not Persist'}},
                    'documents': {
                        'metagen': [
                            {
                                'moduleId': 'metagen',
                                'path': f"backend://{project['id']}/metagen/legacy.yaml",
                                'document': {
                                    'kind': 'metagen.component',
                                    'component': {'id': 'legacy', 'name': 'Legacy', 'description': 'after-failure'},
                                },
                            }
                        ],
                        'metalab': [],
                        'metaview': [],
                    },
                },
            },
        },
    )

    body = response.json()
    assert body['ok'] is False
    assert body['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_SAVE_FAILED'
    assert body['error']['details']['projectId'] == project['id']

    restored_metagen = yaml.safe_load(metagen_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert restored_metagen['component']['description'] == 'before-failure'

    restored_project_yaml = yaml.safe_load((project_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert restored_project_yaml['project']['name'] == project['name']

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-list-after-rollback',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'listProjects',
            'payload': {},
        },
    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    assert list_response['result']['projects'][0]['name'] == project['name']

    assert not (project_root / '.save-staging').exists()


def test_save_all_with_missing_invalid_or_expired_lock_returns_lost_project_lock(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-save-lock-cases',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Save Lock Cases'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    owner_headers = _headers_for_user(runtime_env, 'lock-owner')
    owner_lock = _open_project_and_get_lock(client, project['id'], runtime_env=runtime_env, user_id='lock-owner')

    base_payload = {
        'projectId': project['id'],
        'projectSnapshot': {
            'raw': {'project': {'id': project['id'], 'name': 'Save Lock Cases'}},
            'documents': {'metagen': [], 'metalab': [], 'metaview': []},
        },
    }

    missing_lock = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-missing-lock',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveAll',
            'payload': {**base_payload},
        },
        headers=owner_headers,
    ).json()
    assert missing_lock['ok'] is False
    assert missing_lock['error']['code'] == 'LOST_PROJECT_LOCK'

    invalid_lock = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-invalid-lock',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveAll',
            'payload': {**base_payload, 'lockToken': 'invalid-lock-token'},
        },
        headers=owner_headers,
    ).json()
    assert invalid_lock['ok'] is False
    assert invalid_lock['error']['code'] == 'LOST_PROJECT_LOCK'

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        db.execute(
            'UPDATE project_locks SET expires_at = ? WHERE project_id = ?',
            ('2000-01-01T00:00:00Z', project['id']),
        )
        db.commit()

    expired_lock = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-expired-lock',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveAll',
            'payload': {**base_payload, 'lockToken': owner_lock},
        },
        headers=owner_headers,
    ).json()
    assert expired_lock['ok'] is False
    assert expired_lock['error']['code'] == 'LOST_PROJECT_LOCK'

def test_project_heartbeat_extends_ttl_and_updates_session(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-heartbeat',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Heartbeat Lock'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    headers = _headers_for_user(runtime_env, 'hb-user')
    lock_token = _open_project_and_get_lock(client, project['id'], runtime_env=runtime_env, user_id='hb-user')

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        before_lock = db.execute(
            'SELECT expires_at FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
        db.execute(
            'UPDATE project_locks SET expires_at = ? WHERE project_id = ?',
            ('2000-01-01T00:00:00Z', project['id']),
        )
        db.commit()
    assert before_lock is not None

    stale_heartbeat = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-heartbeat-stale',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'projectHeartbeat',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id'], 'lockToken': lock_token},
        },
        headers=headers,
    ).json()
    assert stale_heartbeat['ok'] is False
    assert stale_heartbeat['error']['code'] == 'LOST_PROJECT_LOCK'

    refreshed_lock = _open_project_and_get_lock(client, project['id'], runtime_env=runtime_env, user_id='hb-user')
    heartbeat = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-heartbeat-live',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'projectHeartbeat',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id'], 'lockToken': refreshed_lock},
        },
        headers=headers,
    ).json()
    assert heartbeat['ok'] is True
    assert heartbeat['result']['projectId'] == project['id']
    assert heartbeat['result']['lockToken'] == refreshed_lock

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        lock_row = db.execute(
            'SELECT expires_at FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
        session_row = db.execute(
            '''
            SELECT last_seen_at, is_active
            FROM project_sessions
            WHERE project_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND lock_token = ?
            ORDER BY updated_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
            ''',
            (project['id'], 'hb-user', refreshed_lock),
        ).fetchone()
    assert lock_row is not None
    assert lock_row['expires_at'] == heartbeat['result']['expiresAt']
    assert session_row is not None
    assert session_row['is_active'] == 1
    assert session_row['last_seen_at']

def test_save_project_as_success_creates_new_project_and_preserves_snapshot(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-save-as-src',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Source Project'},
        },
    ).json()
    source_project = created['result']['project']
    lock_token = _open_project_and_get_lock(
        client,
        source_project['id'],
        runtime_env=runtime_env,
        user_id=runtime_env.default_user_id,
    )

    source_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / source_project['slug']
    (source_root / 'generated' / 'keep.txt').write_text('generated-keep', encoding='utf-8')

    save_as_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-as-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveProjectAs',
            'payload': {
                'projectId': source_project['id'],
                'lockToken': lock_token,
                'newName': 'Cloned Project',
                'projectSnapshot': {
                    'raw': {
                        'kind': 'metaplatform.project',
                        'version': 1,
                        'project': {
                            'id': source_project['id'],
                            'name': 'Source Project',
                            'description': 'cloned',
                        },
                        'modules': ['MetaGen', 'MetaLab', 'MetaView'],
                        'paths': {
                            'metagen': 'metagen',
                            'metalab': 'metalab',
                            'metaview': 'metaview',
                            'generated': 'generated',
                        },
                    },
                    'documents': {
                        'metagen': [
                            {
                                'moduleId': 'metagen',
                                'path': f"backend://{source_project['id']}/metagen/pump.yaml",
                                'document': {
                                    'kind': 'metagen.component',
                                    'component': {'id': 'pump', 'name': 'Pump'},
                                },
                            }
                        ],
                        'metalab': [],
                        'metaview': [],
                    },
                },
            },
        },
    )

    body = save_as_response.json()
    assert body['ok'] is True
    created_project = body['result']['project']
    assert created_project['projectId'] != source_project['id']
    assert created_project['name'] == 'Cloned Project'
    assert isinstance(body['result']['lockToken'], str)
    assert body['result']['lockToken']
    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        source_lock_row = db.execute(
            'SELECT 1 FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (source_project['id'],),
        ).fetchone()
        new_lock_row = db.execute(
            'SELECT lock_token, user_id FROM project_locks WHERE project_id = ?',
            (created_project['projectId'],),
        ).fetchone()
    assert source_lock_row is None
    assert new_lock_row is not None
    assert new_lock_row['lock_token'] == body['result']['lockToken']
    assert new_lock_row['user_id'] == runtime_env.default_user_id

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-list-save-as',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'listProjects',
            'payload': {},
        },
    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    assert len(list_response['result']['projects']) == 2

    new_summary = next(
        project
        for project in list_response['result']['projects']
        if project['id'] == created_project['projectId']
    )
    new_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / new_summary['slug']
    assert new_root.exists()
    assert (new_root / 'metagen').exists()
    assert (new_root / 'metalab').exists()
    assert (new_root / 'metaview').exists()
    assert (new_root / 'generated').exists()

    new_project_yaml = yaml.safe_load((new_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert new_project_yaml['project']['id'] == created_project['projectId']
    assert new_project_yaml['project']['name'] == 'Cloned Project'

    opened = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-open-save-as-result',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': created_project['projectId']},
        },
    ).json()
    assert opened['ok'] is True
    assert opened['result']['snapshot']['project']['projectId'] == created_project['projectId']

    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(

            'payload': {'name': 'Write Failure Source'},
        },
    ).json()
    source_project = created['result']['project']
    source_project_id = source_project['id']
    lock_token = _open_project_and_get_lock(
        client,

        runtime_env=runtime_env,
        user_id=runtime_env.default_user_id,
    )
    source_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / source_project['slug']
    source_project_yaml_before = (source_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')

    def raise_write_failure(*_args, **_kwargs):
        raise OSError('Injected write failure for save-as')

    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage.ProjectStorageService, '_write_yaml_object', staticmethod(raise_write_failure))

    response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-save-as-write-fail',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'saveProjectAs',
            'payload': {
                'projectId': source_project_id,
                'lockToken': lock_token,
                'newName': 'Write Failure Copy',
                'projectSnapshot': {
                    'raw': {'project': {'id': source_project_id, 'name': 'Write Failure Copy'}},
                    'documents': {'metagen': [], 'metalab': [], 'metaview': []},
                },
            },
        },
    )

    body = response.json()
    assert body['ok'] is False
    assert body['error']['code'] == 'PROJECT_SAVE_FAILED'
    assert body['error']['details']['projectId'] == source_project_id

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-list-after-save-as-fail',

            'command': 'listProjects',

    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    assert len(list_response['result']['projects']) == 1
    assert list_response['result']['projects'][0]['id'] == source_project_id

    with db_bootstrap.connect() as db:
        rows = db.execute('SELECT id, slug FROM projects ORDER BY id').fetchall()
    assert len(rows) == 1
    assert rows[0]['id'] == source_project_id

    workspace_entries = [entry for entry in runtime_env.workspace_projects_root.iterdir() if entry.is_dir()]
    assert len(workspace_entries) == 1
    assert workspace_entries[0].name == source_project['slug']

    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_projects_root.rglob('.save-staging'))
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_projects_root.rglob('.save-backup'))
    assert (source_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == source_project_yaml_before

def test_export_project_success_builds_archive_and_keeps_canonical_storage(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-export-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Export Success'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / project['slug']

    (project_root / 'metagen' / 'pump.yaml').write_text(
        yaml.safe_dump(
            {
                'kind': 'metagen.component',
                'component': {'id': 'pump', 'name': 'Pump'},
            },
            sort_keys=False,
            allow_unicode=True,
        ),
        encoding='utf-8',
    )
    (project_root / 'generated' / 'artifact.txt').write_text('generated-artifact', encoding='utf-8')

    before_project_yaml = (project_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    before_metagen_yaml = (project_root / 'metagen' / 'pump.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    before_generated = (project_root / 'generated' / 'artifact.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8')

    export_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-export-success',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'exportProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
    ).json()

    assert export_response['ok'] is True
    export_result = export_response['result']
    assert export_result['fileName'] == f"{project['slug']}.zip"
    assert export_result['downloadUrl'].startswith('/api/project-exports/')
    assert export_result['exportToken']
    artifact_path = runtime_env.workspace_project_exports_root / f"{export_result['exportToken']}.zip"
    assert artifact_path.exists()
    assert export_result['exportToken'] in command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts

    download_response = client.get(export_result['downloadUrl'])
    assert download_response.status_code == 200
    assert download_response.headers.get('content-type', '').startswith('application/zip')

    archive = zipfile.ZipFile(io.BytesIO(download_response.content))
    archived_names = set(archive.namelist())
    assert 'project.yaml' in archived_names
    assert 'metagen/' in archived_names
    assert 'metalab/' in archived_names
    assert 'metaview/' in archived_names
    assert 'generated/' in archived_names
    assert 'metagen/pump.yaml' in archived_names
    assert 'generated/artifact.txt' in archived_names
    assert yaml.safe_load(archive.read('project.yaml').decode('utf-8'))['project']['id'] == project['id']
    assert archive.read('generated/artifact.txt').decode('utf-8') == 'generated-artifact'

    token_reuse_response = client.get(export_result['downloadUrl'])
    assert token_reuse_response.status_code == 404
    assert not artifact_path.exists()
    assert export_result['exportToken'] not in command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts

    assert (project_root / 'project.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == before_project_yaml
    assert (project_root / 'metagen' / 'pump.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == before_metagen_yaml
    assert (project_root / 'generated' / 'artifact.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == before_generated
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_projects_root.rglob('.save-staging'))
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_projects_root.rglob('.save-backup'))

def test_export_project_prunes_stale_unconsumed_artifacts_on_next_export(runtime_env, monkeypatch):
    client = TestClient(app)
    created = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-create-export-prune',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'createProject',
            'payload': {'name': 'Export Prune'},
        },
    ).json()
    project = created['result']['project']
    initial_now = 1_700_000_000
    max_age = project_storage.PROJECT_EXPORT_ARTIFACT_MAX_AGE_SECONDS

    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage.time, 'time', lambda: initial_now)
    first_export = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-export-prune-first',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'exportProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
    ).json()
    assert first_export['ok'] is True
    first_token = first_export['result']['exportToken']
    first_artifact_path = runtime_env.workspace_project_exports_root / f'{first_token}.zip'
    assert first_artifact_path.exists()
    assert first_token in command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts

    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage.time, 'time', lambda: initial_now + max_age + 1)
    second_export = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-export-prune-second',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'exportProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': project['id']},
        },
    ).json()
    assert second_export['ok'] is True
    second_token = second_export['result']['exportToken']

    assert second_token in command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts
    assert first_token not in command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts
    assert not first_artifact_path.exists()

from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path

from .constants import (
    DEFAULT_USER,
    PROCESS_EXECUTION,
    PROJECT_LOCKS,
    RUNTIME_DATA_DIR_NAME,
    SQLITE_FILE_NAME,
    WORKSPACE_DELETED_PROJECTS_DIR,
    WORKSPACE_EXPORTS_DIR,
    WORKSPACE_IMPORTS_DIR,
    WORKSPACE_PROJECTS_DIR,
)


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Settings:
    runtime_root: Path
    data_root: Path
    sqlite_path: Path
    workspace_projects_root: Path
    workspace_deleted_projects_root: Path
    workspace_project_exports_root: Path
    workspace_project_imports_root: Path
    default_user_id: str
    default_username: str
    request_user_id_header: str
    lock_ttl_seconds: int
    lock_heartbeat_interval_seconds: int
    session_mode_edit: str
    process_stream_drain_timeout_seconds: float
    process_stop_soft_timeout_seconds: float
    process_stop_force_timeout_seconds: float


def load_settings() -> Settings:
    runtime_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
    data_root = runtime_root / RUNTIME_DATA_DIR_NAME
    return Settings(
        runtime_root=runtime_root,
        data_root=data_root,
        sqlite_path=data_root / SQLITE_FILE_NAME,
        workspace_projects_root=data_root / WORKSPACE_PROJECTS_DIR,
        workspace_deleted_projects_root=data_root / WORKSPACE_DELETED_PROJECTS_DIR,
        workspace_project_exports_root=data_root / WORKSPACE_EXPORTS_DIR,
        workspace_project_imports_root=data_root / WORKSPACE_IMPORTS_DIR,
        default_user_id=DEFAULT_USER['id'],
        default_username=DEFAULT_USER['username'],
        request_user_id_header=PROJECT_LOCKS['request_user_id_header'],
        lock_ttl_seconds=int(PROJECT_LOCKS['ttl_seconds']),
        lock_heartbeat_interval_seconds=int(PROJECT_LOCKS['heartbeat_interval_seconds']),
        session_mode_edit=PROJECT_LOCKS['session_mode_edit'],
        process_stream_drain_timeout_seconds=float(PROCESS_EXECUTION['stream_policy']['drain_timeout_seconds']),
        process_stop_soft_timeout_seconds=float(PROCESS_EXECUTION['stop_policy']['soft_timeout_seconds']),
        process_stop_force_timeout_seconds=float(PROCESS_EXECUTION['stop_policy']['force_timeout_seconds']),
    )


SETTINGS = load_settings()

def export_files() -> None:
  lines: list[str] = []
  lines.append('=' * 50)
  lines.append('PROJECT EXPORT')
  lines.append('=' * 50)
  lines.append('')

  for relative_path in PROJECT_FILES:
    file_path = ROOT / relative_path

    lines.append('=' * 50)
    lines.append(f'FILE: {relative_path}')
    lines.append('=' * 50)
    lines.append('')

    if not file_path.exists():
      lines.append('[FILE NOT FOUND]')
      lines.append('')
      continue

    try:
      content = file_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    except UnicodeDecodeError:
      content = file_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')

    lines.append(content)
    lines.append('')

  OUTPUT_FILE.write_text('\n'.join(lines), encoding='utf-8')
  print(f'Export finished: {OUTPUT_FILE}')


if __name__ == '__main__':
  export_files()

from dataclasses import replace
import io
import zipfile

import pytest
import yaml
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

from rtb.app.main import app
from rtb.app.core.constants import API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT, API_PROJECT_IMPORTS_ENDPOINT
from rtb.app.core.settings import SETTINGS
from rtb.app.db import bootstrap as db_bootstrap
from rtb.app.services import command_dispatcher, project_catalog, project_storage


@pytest.fixture()
def runtime_env(tmp_path, monkeypatch):
    data_root = tmp_path / 'runtime_data'
    test_settings = replace(
        SETTINGS,
        data_root=data_root,
        sqlite_path=data_root / 'platform.db',
        workspace_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'projects',
        workspace_deleted_projects_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'deleted_projects',
        workspace_project_exports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'exports',
        workspace_project_imports_root=data_root / 'workspace' / 'imports',
    )

    monkeypatch.setattr(db_bootstrap, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_catalog, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    monkeypatch.setattr(project_storage, 'SETTINGS', test_settings)
    command_dispatcher.project_storage_service._project_export_artifacts.clear()

    db_bootstrap.bootstrap_storage()
    return test_settings


def _make_archive(entries: dict[str, str | bytes]) -> bytes:
    payload = io.BytesIO()
    with zipfile.ZipFile(payload, mode='w', compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as archive:
        for path, value in entries.items():
            if path.endswith('/'):
                archive.writestr(path, b'')
                continue
            data = value if isinstance(value, bytes) else value.encode('utf-8')
            archive.writestr(path, data)
    return payload.getvalue()


def _base_project_yaml(name: str) -> str:
    return yaml.safe_dump(
        {
            'kind': 'metaplatform.project',
            'version': 1,
            'project': {
                'id': 'legacy-imported-id',
                'name': name,
                'description': 'imported project',
            },
            'modules': ['MetaGen', 'MetaLab', 'MetaView'],
            'paths': {
                'metagen': 'metagen',
                'metalab': 'metalab',
                'metaview': 'metaview',
                'generated': 'generated',
            },
        },
        sort_keys=False,
        allow_unicode=True,
    )


def _post_import(client: TestClient, archive_name: str, archive_bytes: bytes):
    return client.post(
        API_PROJECT_IMPORTS_ENDPOINT,
        files={'archive': (archive_name, archive_bytes, 'application/zip')},
    )


def test_import_project_success_registers_project_lists_and_opens(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Imported Alpha'),
            'metagen/pump.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component', 'component': {'id': 'pump'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'metalab/start.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario', 'scenario': {'id': 'start'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'metaview/main.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen', 'screen': {'id': 'main'}}, sort_keys=False),
            'generated/artifact.txt': 'keep-generated',
        }
    )

    import_response = _post_import(client, 'imported-alpha.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert import_response['ok'] is True
    imported_project = import_response['result']['project']
    assert imported_project['name'] == 'Imported Alpha'
    assert imported_project['slug'] == 'imported-alpha'

    list_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={'requestId': 'req-import-list', 'module': 'platform', 'command': 'listProjects', 'payload': {}},
    ).json()
    assert list_response['ok'] is True
    listed_ids = [item['id'] for item in list_response['result']['projects']]
    assert imported_project['id'] in listed_ids

    open_response = client.post(
        API_COMMANDS_ENDPOINT,
        json={
            'requestId': 'req-import-open',
            'module': 'platform',
            'command': 'openProject',
            'payload': {'projectId': imported_project['id']},
        },
    ).json()
    assert open_response['ok'] is True
    snapshot = open_response['result']['snapshot']
    assert snapshot['project']['projectId'] == imported_project['id']
    assert snapshot['project']['name'] == imported_project['name']
    assert snapshot['documents']['metagen'][0]['path'].startswith(f"backend://{imported_project['id']}/metagen/")

    project_root = runtime_env.workspace_projects_root / imported_project['slug']
    assert (project_root / 'generated' / 'artifact.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'keep-generated'
    assert not list(runtime_env.workspace_project_imports_root.iterdir())


def test_import_supports_single_wrapper_folder_layout(runtime_env):
    client = TestClient(app)
    archive_bytes = _make_archive(
        {
            'wrapped/': b'',
            'wrapped/project.yaml': _base_project_yaml('Wrapped Import'),
            'wrapped/metagen/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metagen.component'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapped/metalab/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metalab.scenario'}, sort_keys=False),
            'wrapped/metaview/a.yaml': yaml.safe_dump({'kind': 'metaview.screen'}, sort_keys=False),
        }
    )

    response = _post_import(client, 'wrapped.zip', archive_bytes).json()
    assert response['ok'] is True
    assert response['result']['project']['name'] == 'Wrapped Import'
